text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After seeing Narita Taishin off to her<n>prerace
weigh-in on the day of the<n>Arima Kinen, I sit alone
in the waiting<n>room.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

Um, excuse me... Would you happen<n>to be Narita
Taishin's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text: Pleased to meet you. I'm Taishin's<n>mother.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
An older Umamusume who's the<n>spitting image of
Narita Taishin bows<n>to me while I stare at her in
shock.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Once my surprise wears off, we chat<n>together for
a little.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She explains that while most racers<n>are born in
spring, Narita Taishin was<n>born very late, which
could be why<n>she's so petite.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Because of this, her mother was<n>never able to
properly cheer her on<n>due to her fear that Narita
Taishin<n>might get injured in a race.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Yet Taishin insisted on racing. And<n>one day when
her mother apologized<n>to her for her small stature,
Taishin<n>became furious.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's mother proceeds to<n>hand me a
bouquet of flowers and<n>asks me to give it to her
daughter.

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Please don't tell her who they're<n>from. She won't
accept them if she<n>knows I'm the one giving them
to<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Still, I wanted to give her all my<n>support in today's
race. It's the least<n>I can do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's with the flowers?
choice_data_list: Th-they're from a fan! It's for good luck!
Th-they're from a fan! It's for good luck!

text_block_list.text: Uh-huh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Do you two take me for an idiot? And<n>by "you
two," I mean you and my<n>mom.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I told you that my<n>family runs a
business? Well, they<n>run a flower shop.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can tell where these are from just<n>by looking at
how they're wrapped.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. It doesn't matter if my<n>mom's
watching or not.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I run for me and nobody else.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All I gotta do is run and win.
